---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenGive
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.

Example: "It would be helpful to filter organizations by..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Why This Matters

Explain why this feature is important:
- Who would benefit? (donors, journalists, researchers, regulators, etc.)
- What problem does it solve?
- How would it improve OpenGive?

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered alternative solutions or features?

## Acceptance Criteria

What would need to be true for this feature to be considered complete?

- [ ] Users can... (specific action)
- [ ] The system should... (specific behavior)
- [ ] Data should... (specific requirement)

## Mockup or Example

If applicable, provide:
- Screenshot/mockup of UI changes
- Example API response
- Example workflow

## Additional Context

Any other context about the request (similar tools, academic research, use cases, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with OpenGive's transparency mission
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and benefits
